Dreams · Symbols · Numbers

Terms of Use

Last updated: 18 May 2026

1. Agreement

By using psysymbol.com ("the site"), you agree to these terms. The site is operated by RM Technologies LLC ("we", "us"). If you do not agree, please stop using the site.

2. Nature of the content

PsySymbol publishes interpretations of dreams, symbols, and numbers for personal reflection only. The content is informational and cultural. It is not:

  • Medical, psychiatric, or psychological advice or treatment.
  • Diagnosis of any condition, mental or physical.
  • Therapy, counseling, or crisis support.
  • Legal, financial, tax, investment, or relationship advice.
  • A prediction of future events.

If you are in distress or have concerns about your safety or health, contact a qualified professional or local emergency services. Nothing on this site replaces that.

3. Decisions you make

You are solely responsible for any decision you make after reading content here. We accept no liability for actions taken or not taken based on what you read on the site, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.

4. Intellectual property

The original text, code, layout, and visual identity of PsySymbol are © RM Technologies LLC. You may quote short excerpts with a link back to the source. Bulk scraping, republishing, or training machine-learning models on this content without written permission is not allowed.

5. Third-party services

The site uses Google AdSense for advertising and Netlify for hosting. Their use of your data is governed by their respective terms and our Privacy Policy. We may link to third-party products (including Amazon affiliate links). We don't control those sites and aren't responsible for their content or terms.

6. No warranty

The site is provided "as is" and "as available". We don't warrant that content is accurate, complete, current, or fit for any particular purpose. We try our best, but interpretation is by its nature personal and contestable.

7. Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, RM Technologies LLC and its operators are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the site, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or wellbeing.

8. Changes to these terms

We may update these terms from time to time. The "Last updated" date above will change when we do. Continued use of the site after an update means you accept the updated terms.

9. Contact

Questions about these terms: hello@psysymbol.com.

The daily symbol, in your inbox

One considered dream, symbol, or number reading each day. No spam — unsubscribe anytime.
